title: Quick Start Guide: Creating Your First Chart with Graph Italia
description: Follow this guide to visualize your data in minutes. You can use sample data or upload your own.

listItems.item1: Log in to your Graph Italia account.
listItems.item2: On the dashboard, click the "Create New Chart" button to start a new project.

item1.text: If you don't have data yet, you can

items.item1: Sample data: use the datasets provided by Graph Italia (option "Use Sample Data").
items.item2: Generate data: from the Tools section → Generate Data to create a CSV automatically.
items.item3: Upload a CSV: upload your CSV file; Graph Italia will parse it and display the data in a table.

step3.title: Step 3: Choose your chart type and configure (optional)

listItems.item1: After uploading your data, choose the chart type: Bar, Line, Pie, or Geomap.
listItems.item2: Customize: select columns, X/Y axes, colors, and labels.

listItems.item1: Click "Save" to save your chart to your dashboard.
listItems.item2: You can reopen it, edit it, publish it, and get the embed code to add it to your website.

footer.text: That's it! Keep experimenting with datasets, chart types, and settings to get the most out of your visualizations.
